heroSubtext: Supporting you in reconnecting with your inner strength, shifting the narratives that hold you back, and growing into the life and leadership that already exists within you.
storyHeading: Confidence, Mindset, and Transformation – My Story
storyBody:
I'm Shanila — a certified confidence and mindset coach with over ten years of experience working with driven women who are done playing small.

My work is about one thing: strengthening the inner narrative that shapes every decision you make, every room you walk into, and every opportunity you claim or let pass.

Trained by globally recognised coach Vikram Dhar, I bring proven mindset methodologies alongside deep, intuitive coaching — helping women move from self-doubt to self-authority, from invisible to unmissable.

Because the world doesn't need you to work harder. It needs you to believe what you're worth.
credentialsSubtext: I'm committed to continuous learning and professional development to provide you with the best coaching experience.

credentials.title: Master Practitioner in NLP
credentials.description: Advanced certification in Neuro-Linguistic Programming techniques for personal transformation and behavioral change.

credentials.title: Certified Emotional Intelligence Practitioner
credentials.description: Specialized training in understanding and applying emotional intelligence for personal and professional growth.

credentials.title: ICF Associate Certified Coach
credentials.description: Accredited by the International Coach Federation, demonstrating commitment to professional coaching standards and ethics.

credentials.title: Vedic Numerologist
credentials.description: Trained in science of Vedic Numerology to provide insights into life paths, challenges, and opportunities.

valuesSubtext: These core values guide every coaching session and relationship I build with my clients.

values.title: Compassion
values.description: Compassion is the foundation of meaningful coaching. It creates a safe and non-judgmental space where you are truly heard, supported and empowered to explore challenges.

values.title: Curiosity
values.description: Curiosity is the key to deeper insight. By asking thoughtful questions and exploring without judgement, it helps you connect with what truly drives your decisions and directions.

values.title: Clarity
values.description: Clarity transforms awareness into actionable direction. It helps you cut through confusion, identify priorities, and make decisions with confidence and purpose.

values.title: Confidence
values.description: Confidence empowers to trust oneself. It encourages to embrace your strength, and take bold, purposeful steps toward your goals. It turns intention into meaningful action.
